testimonials.name: Sarah Mitchell
testimonials.quote: I made my first $27 commission in 6 days. I've never done this before and the AI prompts made it so easy.

testimonials.name: James Rodriguez
testimonials.quote: No money needed to start. I used free platforms exactly as shown and got my first click on day 3.

testimonials.name: Emily Chen
testimonials.quote: The step-by-step approach removed all confusion. I knew exactly what to do next.

testimonials.name: David Thompson
testimonials.quote: At 58, I thought AI was too complicated. The copy-paste prompts proved me wrong.
